reasoning: The control AU-3-d focuses on ensuring that audit records capture the source of events. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to the audit logging capabilities of the API server. The function 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' ensures that audit logging is active. 'k8s_audit_policy_captures_source' would verify that the audit policy is configured to capture the source of events, such as user identity and request origin. 'k8s_audit_log_retention_configured' ensures that logs are retained for a sufficient period to allow for auditing and forensic analysis.
title: Content Of Audit Records - Source of the event;
